violations.text: Proper cooling methods were not used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods. Marinara was placed hot (86DF) in the walk-in in covered plastic containers greater than four inches deep. Per PIC marinara was pulled from stove top recently and was placed in an ice bath after. Marinara was removed from ice bath too soon. Any food cooling should reach 41 degrees or lower prior to covering. Food was moved back to ice bath to finish cooling process. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/03/2024
